headline: Congress takes a breather with Senate in pro forma session and House adjourning after three minutes—skeleton crew holds the fort before Monday action kicks off!

senate.lastSessionSummary: The Senate convened briefly in pro forma session on Thursday, July 9, meeting at 4 p.m. and adjourning within seconds to preserve legislative business. No substantive floor action took place.

house.lastSessionSummary: The House held a short session on Thursday, July 9, meeting at 3 p.m. and adjourning at 3:03 p.m. The chamber introduced 39 public bills and 3 resolutions, and filed six committee reports on various healthcare, travel, homeland security, and aviation measures.

onTheFloor.title: Reauthorize the Accelerating Access to Critical Therapies for ALS Act through fiscal year 2031
Establish the IMPROVE Initiative within the National Institutes of Health
Establish funds for investments in aviation security
Reorganize and realign the Department of Homeland Security Engagement, Liaison, and Outreach Office
Assess terrorism threats posed by foreign terrorist organizations in major non-NATO allied countries

committees.topic: Hearing on H.R. 139 (Sunshine Protection Act of 2025), H.R. 8595 (National Security, Department of State appropriations), H.R. 9237 (Veterans benefits), and H.R. 1181 (Privacy in purchases)

committees.committee: Committee on Veterans' Affairs, Subcommittee on Technology Modernization
committees.topic: PACT Act Implementation: Modernizing VA Disability Claims Through Effective Technology
